metadata.description: Psychologically-enhanced parallel agents for bug hunting, fixing, and performance optimization

plugins.name: bughunt
plugins.description: Psychologically-enhanced bug hunting with personality-primed parallel agents

plugins.name: bugfix
plugins.description: Surgical bug fixing. Reads BUGHUNT.md and applies minimal, tactical fixes. Prefers deletion over addition.

plugins.name: speedrun
plugins.description: Parallel optimization hunters that find performance bottlenecks, reduce bundle sizes, eliminate dead code, and verify improvements with before/after metrics.

plugins.name: codebase-simplify
plugins.description: Orchestrates full-codebase simplification by running /simplify on each module with auto-commits and resume support
